notes: SHIP v1.14.230 — .229 device-verify follow-ups: FLAT elevation fit HARDENED + 1U readability + overlap badge + nav-bleed (root-caused via a dedicated investigation agent). CONTEXT: .228's '48U fits one screen' was an ILLUSION — most blocks were transparent (unaliased types) so an over-tall elevation LOOKED fitted; .229's opaque dark trays exposed the real overflow (scroll returned + text bled under the fixed nav). ALL fixes body.rd-scoped/rd-branched -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. (1) FIT: rackFlat_applyFit rewritten robust — measures the CANVAS after a double-requestAnimationFrame (was setTimeout(0) firing mid entrance-animation -> gridTop~=0 -> --u-h~=15px -> only ~U48-U30 visible); retries on rAF if canvasTop<=0 (panel not laid out yet); CLAMPS --u-h (8px floor) and NEVER bails to the overflowing calc() default; CLIPS the canvas to navTop-12 with overflow:hidden; re-fits on a debounced resize/orientationchange. Grid gains .reh-fitted (rd) and the CSS default hardened to max(8px, calc((100dvh - 320px)/totalU)) for the single pre-JS frame. (2) 1U READABILITY: at ~10-14px/U the 13px name line-box was clipped by overflow:hidden into a strikethrough band and 1U rows merged; .reh-fitted rules tighten block padding to 3px/8px and force 1U rows to a single 10px line (hiding the redundant U-tag). (3) NAV BLEED: body.rd .rack-canvas overflow-y:auto -> overflow:hidden, so it clips at the nav instead of paging content under the translucent fixed bar. (4) U38 ORPHAN = REAL MASTER DATA: two slots claim uEnd=38 (an 8U U31-U38 device AND a separate 1U 'other' at U38), both computing the same top. Rendered BOTH (no silent drop): the nested 1U now gets .is-overlap and insets to the right as a badge instead of a phantom floating row. !!FLAG TO JOHN: this is a U-COLLISION in the master (pre-flight-linter territory) — confirm whether the 1U 'other' at U38 is real or a master artifact. Gates: node --check sw.js + 4 inline blocks, CSS braces balanced, CRLF, three-stamp .229->.230. No ecc pass this ship (session cost); root-caused by the investigation agent instead. DEVICE-VERIFY (HARD STOP, John iPhone): (1) FLAT shows ALL 48U on one screen, NO scroll, nothing bleeding under the bottom nav; (2) 1U devices (leaf/mgmt) render as clean single-line rows — no strikethrough/overlap; (3) the U38 'other' reads as an inset badge on the U31-U38 tray, not a floating fragment (and tell me whether that device should exist at all); (4) trays still dark body + type accent + readable text (.229 look preserved); (5) rotate the phone -> still fits; (6) ?legacy=1 unchanged. Batch now 9 owed. Stage A stays GATED until this verifies clean.
